authority.note: This map names mock-only composition units. JSX props, selectors, and component boundaries do not define Rust or egui public APIs.

referenceSources.notes: Primary decomposition source. #all-surfaces is the integrated structural golden; it does not authorize product implementation or settle token values.
M3 structural golden and comparison source for layout, density, causality, Z, and Group meaning. Concrete color values are not product tokens.
Generative-boundary structural golden candidate; not the default component decomposition source.
State-fixture and visual mapping candidates for G0-6; no candidate fixes product token values before human review.
Small-core and plugin-responsibility learning fixture; it does not define plugin traits, custom UI APIs, or Document schema.
Retained for visual-composition comparison. New decomposition work must not treat it as the current integrated reference.
Static timeline comparison; not a product UI or golden.
State-step comparison; not a token or product UI decision.
Interaction-dynamics comparison; not an amendment of the current integrated reference.
